appraisal_events.evidence: « Au matin je rendis la dépêche au portier de l'hôtel en disant qu'on me l'avait remise par erreur... je promis de faire comme si je ne l'avais jamais reçue. J'avais définitivement cessé d'aimer Albertine. »
appraisal_events.explanation: Offered a chance at renewed contact and marriage, the narrator chooses to deny receipt of Albertine’s telegram and to act as if it never arrived, explicitly affirming that he no longer loves her. This functions as a deliberate exclusion of Albertine.

status_effects.explanation: She is decisively excluded from the narrator’s life despite the opportunity for reunion, as he rejects contact and affirms the end of his love.
